headline: 1 Momentum  Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Avoid
summary: The stocks featured in this article are seeing some big returns. Over the past month, they’ve outpaced the market due to some combination of positive news, upbeat results, or supportive macro developments. As such, investors are taking notice and bidding up shares.

headline: $64 Million Exit: Lamb Weston Stock Down 9% As Investor Dumps 1 Million Shares
summary: Lamb Weston specializes in value-added frozen potato products for retail and foodservice customers worldwide.

headline: Gates Capital Boosts TIC Solutions Stake to $150 Million Even With Stock Down 24% This Past Year
summary: This specialty business services firm delivers technical testing and inspection solutions across the U.S. and Canada.
